overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game depicting a character walking through a dark, rain-soaked suburban street at night. The character navigates past decaying buildings and abandoned vehicles while street lamps cast dim light through the heavy fog and rain.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing before a decaying wooden building entrance in heavy rain. The character descends concrete stairs with a metal handrail, turns left onto the wet street, and walks away from the building as a street lamp becomes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dark residential street illuminated by distant street lamps. An abandoned pickup truck comes into view on the right, which the character passes while walking past piles of wet leaves and a chain link fence.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet street as a car approaches in the distance. An abandoned trailer RV becomes prominent on the right, which the character passes while walking alongside a brick building wall. Street lamps cast reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

wooden pallets and debris piled on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a brick building facade with a wooden door at the end of an alleyway. Metal barrels and wooden pallets are visible on the left. The character's flashlight illuminates the weathered brick wall and door as they draw closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a decaying building through a rain-soaked suburban street toward a secluded alleyway. It begins as the character descends concrete stairs and turns onto a wet road, moving away from a wooden structure toward the dim glow of distant street lamps. As the character progresses, the scene opens up to reveal an abandoned pickup truck and piles of wet leaves beside a chain link fence. The camera then shifts across the reflective pavement, passing a weathered trailer RV and a brick wall while a car approaches in the distance. Finally, the movement leads into a narrow alleyway filled with metal barrels and wooden pallets, ending as a flashlight illuminates a weathered brick facade and a wooden door.
